hints.taming_chance_base: Lower is easier: 1 = 100% per feed, 100 = 1% per feed
hints.taming_chance_chicken: Lower is easier: 1 = 100% per feed, 100 = 1% per feed
hints.taming_chance_beef: Lower is easier: 1 = 100% per feed, 100 = 1% per feed
hints.taming_chance_hearty: Lower is easier: 1 = 100% per feed, 100 = 1% per feed
hints.taming_chance: Lower is easier: 1 = 100% per attempt, 100 = 1% per attempt
hints.taming_chance_tropical: Lower is easier: 1 = 100% per feed, 100 = 1% per feed
hints.legacy_taming: true = simple food taming, false = special mechanics (rodeo/low-health)
hints.egg_storm_instant_chance: 1 in N chance to instantly hatch when placed during a storm
hints.egg_drop_chance: Chance (0-1) for females to drop an egg on death
hints.egg_loot_pillager_outpost: Chance (0-1) for egg in pillager outpost chests
hints.egg_loot_shipwreck_treasure: Chance (0-1) for egg in shipwreck treasure chests
hints.egg_loot_ancient_city: Chance (0-1) for egg in ancient city chests
hints.egg_loot_bastion_treasure: Chance (0-1) for egg in bastion treasure chests
hints.egg_loot_nether_bridge: Chance (0-1) for egg in nether fortress chests
hints.aggressive_wild: true = wild dragons aggro on sight, false = only retaliate
hints.griefing_enabled: true = this dragon can break/destroy blocks (global dragonGriefingEnabled must also be true)
hints.reactive_terrain_clearing_on_damage: true = clear soft obstructing blocks when hurt (requires mobGriefing)
hints.reactive_terrain_clearing_on_damage_tame: true = tamed dragons can also clear on hurt (off = safer bases)
hints.taming_stun_health: Health threshold for taming stun (0 = disable stun)
hints.wild_flying_speed_multiplier: Scales AI flight speed only for untamed dragons (1 = default, ridden flight unchanged)
hints.summon_storm_cooldown_ticks: Cooldown for Summon Storm (20 ticks = 1 second)
hints.summon_storm_supercharge_ticks: How long Summon Storm supercharge lasts (20 ticks = 1 second)
hints.summon_storm_supercharge_damage_multipli: Damage multiplier applied while supercharged (1 = normal damage)
hints.summon_storm_duration_ticks: How long thunderstorm weather is enforced (20 ticks = 1 second)
hints.phase2_toggle_on_chance: Chance (0-1) to switch from phase 1 to phase 2 when grounded
hints.phase2_toggle_off_chance: Chance (0-1) to switch from phase 2 back to phase 1 when grounded
hints.phase2_decision_min_ticks: Minimum ticks between phase switch checks (20 ticks = 1 second)
hints.phase2_decision_max_ticks: Maximum ticks between phase switch checks (20 ticks = 1 second)
